channel.title: Lateral Movement on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Lateral Movement on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: Splunk-ShadowRoast
item.description: Investigating an AD compromise where an attacker gained initial access via a malicious download, established persistence, dropped Rubeus and Mimikatz, performed AS-REP Roasting to crack a user’s password offline, and laterally moved to a file server for data exfiltration.
